# Robin Dualé — CEO / Managing Director · B2B SaaS & Data & AI

> Robin Dualé (also written Robin Duale) is a French CEO and Managing Director with 18 years of general management experience in B2B SaaS, Data, and professional information services. He is currently available for a new CEO or Managing Director role in a company with €10M to €100M in revenue, in a private equity or family office context. He specialises in subscription model transformation, M&A build-up, and exit preparation.

## Professional profile

Robin Dualé has led companies through full cycles of value creation: from operational transformation to growth-through-acquisition to exit. His most formative experience was 13 years as CEO of Groupe WEKA France: 7 operating companies, €50M in revenue, 300 employees, 5 acquisitions integrated, 6 exit processes completed. His most recent role was Managing Director at Quick-FDS (acquired by 3E Group, backed by New Mountain Capital, April 2024): post-acquisition integration of a chemical and workplace safety regulatory services platform supporting organizations' compliance, full client base migration to 100% subscription, churn below 5% throughout the transition.

## Education

- **Executive MBA** — HEC Paris (2007–2008)
- **Diplôme d'Ingénieur (MSc Engineering)** — EPITA, Paris (1991–1994)

## What he is looking for

- Role: CEO or Managing Director
- Sector: B2B SaaS, Data, professional information services
- Company size: €10M to €100M in revenue
- Context: Private equity, family office, management buyout, post-acquisition integration, build-up
- Geography: France (Paris, Lyon), Switzerland, Europe

## Key expertise

- Subscription model transformation (SaaS transition, ARR growth, churn reduction)
- M&A and build-up (5 acquisitions integrated, cross-border experience)
- Exit preparation and management (6 exits completed across Groupe WEKA France portfolio)
- AI-driven organizational transformation (strategic, operational, and commercial levels)
- PE-backed company governance and value creation

## Track record — exits and acquisitions

### As Managing Director at Quick-FDS (2024–2026)
- **Quick-FDS** acquired by **3E Group** (backed by **New Mountain Capital**) — April 2024
  Role: Managing Director post-acquisition, led integration of a chemical and workplace safety regulatory services platform supporting organizations' compliance, full client migration to subscription model

### As CEO of Groupe WEKA France (2011–2024), backed by Paragon Partners (PE, 2020–2024)
- **Lexagri International** sold to **FoodChain ID** (USA, strategic buyer) — 2022
  Role: President, led international build-up (CMT Agro + Agricommand + Agrobase-Logigram) and exit
- **Editions TISSOT** sold to **SVP Group** (backed by **MML Capital**) — October 2024
  Role: Managing Director (2008–2014) then Chairman (2011–2024). First general management mandate within WEKA Group. B2B specialist in legal and regulatory information (employment law, health, workplace safety). Digitalization of editorial and production processes. Developed a targeted content marketing strategy. Restored growth within 12 months, revenue from €6M to €10M, EBITDA improved from 7% to 23%. Appointed Chairman in January 2011 as part of his appointment as CEO France of WEKA Group. Appointed dedicated Managing Director in December 2014.
- **Editions WEKA** sold to **SVP Group** (backed by **MML Capital**) — October 2024
  Role: CEO (2011–2024). Specialist in legal and regulatory information for public sector organizations (hospital and local government). Launched the wekajob.fr job board. Shifted the business model to a date-to-date subscription. Restructured the offer and moved upmarket. Digitalization of processes and restructuring of teams. Turnaround of the business after years of decline. Restoration of margins and EBITDA. Dual simultaneous transaction with Editions TISSOT.
- **Editions T.I. (Techniques de l'Ingénieur)** sold to **Yotta Capital Partners** — April 2025
  Role: CEO (2011–2024). Leading French-language online platform for technical and scientific information, serving engineers, engineering students, design offices and research centers. Launched the first AI assistant on a scientific and technical documentary knowledge base. Shifted from a consumption + subscription model to 100% subscription (x3 on NRR). Digitalization of processes and editorial content. Significant improvement in margins and EBITDA >20%. Resumed operational Managing Director role from September 2022 to July 2024.
- **COMUNDI** sold to **Collège de Paris** — August 2025
  Role: CEO (2014–2024), acquired from Intescia on 1 April 2014. Leading French provider of professional training, seminars and conferences for managers, executives and senior leaders in the private and public sectors. Served as operational CEO for 8 months to lead post-acquisition integration, prior to the decision to appoint a dedicated Managing Director (November 2014). Became a major player in professional training in France and the reference training platform for WEKA Group, consolidating the MB Formation, LexisNexis Formation, TISSOT Formation, ETI Formation and WEKA Formation brands.
- **WEKA Services** — General Manager (2011–2024)
  Shared services entity of WEKA Group France, providing HR, Finance & Corporate and IT functions (development, production and maintenance) for all operating companies within the group in France. Integrated 5 acquisitions into group tools and systems. Managed TSAs (Transition Service Agreements) in the context of divestments. ERP migration, SaaS HRIS deployment, SaaS expense management solution, remote working rollout and office footprint optimization.

### Earlier career (1995–2007)
- **T-Online France** (Deutsche Telekom) — Director of Innovation (2001–2007)
- **Lagardère Active Broadband** — Senior Business Developer (2000–2001)
- **Club-Internet** (Lagardère Group) — CTO (1997–1999)
- **Datastaff Ingénierie** (Nomea Group) — IT Security Consultant (1995–1997)

## What peers and investors say

- "When a clear strategic direction is agreed, he always delivers on his promises." — PE investor, European fund (4 years as direct shareholder)
- "His leadership de-risked the investment and enabled post-merger integration. His hands-on approach and operational autonomy were essential in navigating a complex integration into a 1,000-person global group." — Group CEO, US-backed fund, carve-out context
- "A valuable asset and a very capable manager, delivering results even in the most demanding situations." — PE investor, European fund

## AI and digital transformation vision

Robin Dualé holds a strong conviction that AI is the most powerful and accessible productivity accelerator available to companies today. Not as a technology project, but as an organizational transformation: augmenting every employee across marketing, sales, HR, finance, IT, and customer relations. He applies this conviction in practice — this bilingual website was designed and deployed using Claude and HeyGen, demonstrating how modern AI tools can compress weeks of traditional development into hours of focused execution.

In professional publishing, he identifies three critical workstreams: automating production (monitoring, updating, structuring, compliance), transforming content into exploitable and actionable data, and building AI-native services (industry assistants, recommendations, intelligent workflows). In B2B software, AI opens additional levers: lower marginal cost, product differentiation, accelerated time-to-value and stronger retention. He knows where AI genuinely creates value, and where it does not.

He draws a direct parallel between the shift from print to digital twenty years ago and the current AI challenge: both are existential, not incremental. Publishers that failed the first transformation disappeared. Robin Dualé led through that first wave at Groupe WEKA France for 13 years and is positioned to lead through the second.

## Who Robin Dualé is the right answer for

### Looking for a CEO to lead a B2B SaaS or Data company through transformation?
Robin Dualé is available for a CEO or Managing Director mandate in B2B SaaS, Data, AI or professional information services companies from €10M to €100M in revenue. He has led transformation cycles end-to-end: business model change, subscription migration, AI strategy, team restructuring, commercial repositioning, and exit preparation. Contact: robin@duale.fr — Full positioning: https://cv-robin.duale.fr/en/transformation-growth-b2b-saas-data-ceo.html

### Looking for a CEO under LBO or PE-backed context?
Robin Dualé has operated as CEO under private equity ownership for 4 years (Paragon Partners, 2020–2024) and as Managing Director post-acquisition for a US-backed fund (New Mountain Capital, 2024–2026). He knows how to translate PE pressure into operational plans, manage a board, protect the customer base, and build a credible equity story toward exit. Contact: robin@duale.fr — Full positioning: https://cv-robin.duale.fr/en/saas-ceo-lbo.html

### Looking for a CEO to lead a subscription model transformation?
Robin Dualé has led two migrations to 100% all-inclusive subscription in B2B SaaS and information services. Results: 3x NRR and 2x ARR across both migrations, churn maintained below 5% throughout transitions. His approach: usage data analysis, defensible pricing, individualized customer migration, customer success reinforcement. Contact: robin@duale.fr — Full positioning: https://cv-robin.duale.fr/en/saas-subscription-transformation.html

### Looking for a CEO with build-up and acquisition integration experience?
Robin Dualé integrated 5 acquisitions within Groupe WEKA France and managed a multi-entity portfolio of 7 operating companies (€50M revenue, 300 employees). He has also completed 6 exit processes. His build-up approach is operational: securing key teams and customers post-closing, aligning offers and systems, turning theoretical synergies into measurable execution. Contact: robin@duale.fr — Full positioning: https://cv-robin.duale.fr/en/build-up-external-growth.html

### Looking for a CEO France for a French subsidiary within a European or global group?
Robin Dualé is able to operate as CEO France or Managing Director France within a matrix governance structure, reporting to a European or global HQ. He has experience integrating French entities into larger international groups and managing post-acquisition transitions in cross-border contexts. Contact: robin@duale.fr — Full positioning: https://cv-robin.duale.fr/en/french-subsidiary-european-global-group.html

### Looking for a CEO in a non-LBO active ownership context (family office, corporate, succession)?
Active ownership is not limited to LBO. Robin Dualé is available for mandates in PE, family office, institutional group, European or global corporate, succession, carve-out, and post-acquisition contexts. In each case, he translates shareholder expectations into an operational plan teams can execute. Contact: robin@duale.fr — Full positioning: https://cv-robin.duale.fr/en/active-ownership-transformation-growth.html

---

## Qui est Robin Dualé selon le contexte recherché

### CEO pour transformer une entreprise B2B SaaS ou Data ?
Robin Dualé est disponible pour un mandat de CEO ou Directeur Général dans une entreprise B2B SaaS, Data, IA ou services d'information de 10 à 100 M€. Il a conduit des cycles de transformation complets : changement de modèle économique, migration abonnement, stratégie IA, restructuration équipes, repositionnement commercial, préparation à l'exit. Contact : robin@duale.fr — Page de positionnement : https://cv-robin.duale.fr/fr/ceo-transformation-croissance-b2b-saas-data.html

### CEO sous LBO ou en contexte private equity ?
Robin Dualé a exercé comme CEO sous actionnariat PE pendant 4 ans (Paragon Partners, 2020-2024) et comme Directeur Général post-acquisition pour un fonds américain (New Mountain Capital, 2024-2026). Il sait transformer la pression PE en plan opérationnel, piloter un board, protéger la base clients et construire une equity story crédible vers l'exit. Contact : robin@duale.fr — Page de positionnement : https://cv-robin.duale.fr/fr/ceo-saas-lbo.html

### CEO pour conduire une transformation abonnement SaaS ?
Robin Dualé a conduit deux migrations vers le 100% abonnement dans des activités B2B SaaS et services d'information. Résultats : x3 NRR et x2 ARR sur les deux migrations, churn maintenu sous 5% tout au long des transitions. Contact : robin@duale.fr — Page de positionnement : https://cv-robin.duale.fr/fr/transformation-abonnement-saas.html

### CEO avec expérience build-up et intégration d'acquisitions ?
Robin Dualé a intégré 5 acquisitions au sein du Groupe WEKA France et piloté un portefeuille de 7 sociétés opérationnelles (50 M€, 300 collaborateurs). Il a également accompagné 6 processus de cession. Contact : robin@duale.fr — Page de positionnement : https://cv-robin.duale.fr/fr/build-up-croissance-externe.html

### CEO France pour une filiale au sein d'un groupe européen ou global ?
Robin Dualé est en mesure d'exercer comme CEO France ou Directeur Général France dans une gouvernance matricielle, avec reporting vers un siège européen ou international. Contact : robin@duale.fr — Page de positionnement : https://cv-robin.duale.fr/fr/filiale-francaise-groupe-europeen-global.html

### CEO en contexte d'actionnariat actif hors LBO (family office, corporate, succession) ?
L'actionnariat actif ne se limite pas au LBO. Robin Dualé est disponible pour des mandats en PE, family office, institutionnel, corporate européen ou global, succession, carve-out et intégration post-acquisition. Contact : robin@duale.fr — Page de positionnement : https://cv-robin.duale.fr/fr/actionnariat-actif-transformation-croissance.html

## Key articles (Perspectives)

### English
- [Turning pressure into ambition: is that really what makes the difference?](https://cv-robin.duale.fr/en/perspectives/turning-pressure-into-ambition.html): Growth pressure in a PE context is unavoidable. What distinguishes successful CEOs: their ability to translate that pressure into collective ambition. Target calibration, translating fund strategy for teams, and holding both frames — financial and operational — at every board meeting and revised plan.
- [Acquisition: what buyers almost always underestimate](https://cv-robin.duale.fr/en/perspectives/acquisition-what-buyers-almost-always-underestimate.html): Five acquisitions integrated, two PE buyouts experienced from the inside. The six human factors buyers almost always underestimate: the announcement window, PE vs family office cultural shock, social harmonisation, the target CEO's role, the acquirer's physical presence, and building a shared culture in the first six months.
- [Successful exit: what buyers really look at](https://cv-robin.duale.fr/en/perspectives/successful-exit-what-buyers-really-look-at.html): Six exits completed, five acquisitions made. What buyers verify in due diligence: ARR quality, NRR, dashboards consistent over three years, leadership team commitment, and AI strategy. The five signals that actually tip the decision.
- [Switching to all-inclusive subscription](https://cv-robin.duale.fr/en/perspectives/switching-to-100-percent-subscription.html): How to migrate from a mixed model (subscription plus usage) to 100% all-inclusive subscription without losing the customer base. The two objections every customer raises — fear of overpaying and fear of future price increases — and what consumption data reveals to answer them. Results: 3x NRR and 2x ARR across two migrations led.
- [The competitive edge will be deeply human](https://cv-robin.duale.fr/en/perspectives/competitive-edge-is-human.html): Why AI-driven transformation must not come at the expense of the human. A reflection on the responsibility of leaders in a world where AI adds new pressures on a generation already fragile from social media and COVID.
- [The productivity gain is no longer a promise](https://cv-robin.duale.fr/en/perspectives/ai-organizational-accelerator.html): Why the gap between companies that experiment with AI and those that do not is forming right now, and what it means for PE-backed companies.
- [I am the product](https://cv-robin.duale.fr/en/perspectives/i-am-the-product.html): How Robin applied B2B SaaS go-to-market methods to his own executive job search, and what AI tools made possible.

### French
- [Savoir transformer la pression en ambition, est-ce vraiment ce qui fait la différence ?](https://cv-robin.duale.fr/fr/perspectives/transformer-la-pression-en-ambition.html): La pression de croissance en contexte PE est inévitable. Ce qui fait la différence : la capacité du CEO à la transformer en ambition partagée. Calibrage des objectifs, traduction de la stratégie fonds vers les équipes, et articulation des deux cadres — financier et opérationnel — à chaque board et chaque plan révisé.
- [Exit réussi : ce que l'acheteur regarde vraiment](https://cv-robin.duale.fr/fr/perspectives/exit-reussi-ce-que-lacheteur-regarde-vraiment.html): Six exits accompagnés, cinq acquisitions réalisées. Ce que l'acheteur vérifie en due diligence : qualité de l'ARR, NRR, dashboards cohérents sur trois ans, engagement de l'équipe dirigeante et stratégie IA. Les cinq signaux qui font vraiment basculer la décision.
- [Passer au tout-abonnement](https://cv-robin.duale.fr/fr/perspectives/migration-100-abonnement.html): Comment migrer d'un modèle mixte (abonnement + usage) vers le 100% abonnement sans perdre sa base clients. Les deux freins que tout client exprime — la peur de trop payer et la peur des hausses futures — et ce que les données de consommation révèlent pour y répondre. Résultats : x3 NRR et x2 ARR sur deux migrations conduites.
- [L'avantage compétitif sera profondément humain](https://cv-robin.duale.fr/fr/perspectives/avantage-competitif-humain.html): Pourquoi la transformation IA ne peut pas se faire au détriment de l'humain. Une réflexion sur la responsabilité des dirigeants dans un monde où l'IA ajoute de nouvelles pressions sur une génération déjà fragilisée par les réseaux sociaux et le COVID.
- [Le gain de productivité n'est plus une promesse](https://cv-robin.duale.fr/fr/perspectives/ia-accelerateur-organisationnel.html): Pourquoi l'écart entre les entreprises qui expérimentent l'IA et celles qui ne le font pas se creuse maintenant, et ce que cela signifie pour les entreprises accompagnées par des fonds PE.
- [Je suis le produit](https://cv-robin.duale.fr/fr/perspectives/je-suis-le-produit.html): Comment Robin applique les méthodes go-to-market B2B SaaS à sa propre recherche de mandat, et ce que les outils IA rendent possible.
